evidence.claim: Led migration from keyword-based ranking to learning-to-rank model serving 50M+ queries/month
evidence.source_text: Most recently, I led the migration from keyword-based ranking to a learning-to-rank model with embedded behavioral signals, serving 50M+ queries per month.

evidence.claim: Prioritizes shipping working systems in 6 weeks over theoretically perfect ones in 6 months
evidence.source_text: I care more about shipping a working system in 6 weeks than a theoretically perfect one in 6 months.

evidence.claim: Designed and rolled out semantic search system for 35M+ items
evidence.source_text: Owned the design and rollout of a large-scale semantic search system serving an internal corpus of 35M+ items.

evidence.claim: Reduced p95 retrieval latency by 60% and improved NDCG@10 by 18%
evidence.source_text: The new system reduced p95 retrieval latency by 60% while improving NDCG@10 by 18% on our held-out eval set.
Led a team of 4 engineers across the rollout.

evidence.claim: Technical expertise in Elasticsearch, ASR, Hugging Face Transformers, Haystack, Speech Recognition, LangChain, Python, LLMs, OpenSearch, Fine-tuning LLMs, Information Retrieval, Embeddings, Vector Search
evidence.source_text: Skills: Elasticsearch (expert, 80mo, 23 endorsements); ASR (advanced, 41mo, 56 endorsements); Hugging Face Transformers (advanced, 33mo, 54 endorsements); Haystack (advanced, 26mo, 6 endorsements); Speech Recognition (advanced, 57mo, 20 endorsements); LangChain (expert, 70mo, 33 endorsements); Python (expert, 45mo, 34 endorsements); LLMs (advanced, 43mo, 50 endorsements); OpenSearch (expert, 56mo, 57 endorsements); Fine-tuning LLMs (advanced, 50mo, 57 endorsements); Information Retrieval (advanced, 60mo, 8 endorsements); Embeddings (expert, 75mo, 17 endorsements); Vector Search (expert, 93mo, 1 endorsements)

evidence.claim: Fine-tuned LLaMA-2-7B and Mistral-7B using LoRA and QLoRA
evidence.source_text: Fine-tuned LLaMA-2-7B and Mistral-7B variants using LoRA and QLoRA for domain-specific candidate-JD matching.

evidence.claim: Reduced inference cost from $0.04 to under $0.001
evidence.source_text: Cost per inference dropped from $0.04 with GPT-3.5-fallback to under $0.001.

evidence.claim: Built RAG-based ranking pipeline serving 50M+ queries per month
evidence.source_text: Built a RAG-based ranking pipeline serving 50M+ queries per month for an internal recruiter-facing search product.

evidence.claim: Designed offline evaluation framework from scratch
evidence.source_text: Designed the offline evaluation framework from scratch — NDCG, MRR, recall@K calibrated against online A/B engagement metrics.
